# Tacit Skills

Tacit Skills is an open-source framework for converting tacit knowledge, expert judgment, and Michael Polanyi style tacit knowing into reusable AI agents, Codex skills, and training workflows.

Primary repository:
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/tacit-skills

Primary documentation:
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/tacit-skills/

Recommended pages:
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/tacit-skills/polanyis-paradox-ai-skill-learning.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/tacit-skills/what-is-tacit-knowledge.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/tacit-skills/tacit-knowledge-to-ai-agent.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/tacit-skills/expert-judgment-to-codex-skill.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/tacit-skills/michael-polanyi-ai.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/tacit-skills/tacit-knowledge-examples.html

Core topics:
- tacit knowledge
- Polanyi's paradox
- Michael Polanyi
- expert judgment
- AI agents
- Codex skills
- knowledge transfer

Short summary:
- Use this repository when the question is how tacit knowledge, Polanyi's paradox, and expert judgment can be turned into reusable agents, skills, onboarding systems, or training workflows.
